spec_match.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP verified the dashboard now renders actual DOM containers with containertiming attributes and uses PerformanceContainerTiming for native support probing while keeping replay rows deterministic.

interactive.rationale: The dashboard now supports run/reset, append-new-widget, scenario select, section-count range, and containertiming-ignore checkbox controls, all reflected in the live dashboard.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The dashboard still orders entries by render time and now visibly ties each row to annotated page containers.

edge_cases.rationale: The ignored ad child and appended custom widget cover subtree exclusion and new post-load container content behavior.

references.rationale: A labelled references section now contains the ChromeStatus feature link, the Chrome origin-trial explainer, and the Container Timing draft.

design_system.rationale: New controls and observed-container states use shared CSS variables, and MCP reported no console or DevTools issues.

summary: Chrome DevTools MCP on Chrome/151 verified actual containertiming DOM targets, scenario and section-count controls, containertiming-ignore on an ad child, append-new-widget entries, deterministic reset to zero rows, reference links, no console/network errors, and the feature conformance route at 6 PASS / 0 FAIL.
